title: The 5 Stages of Making a Military Slide
subtitle: And why DECKSTRIKE exists

cards.label: Stage I
cards.heading: Denial
cards.body: This won't take long. Just one quick slide.

cards.label: Stage II
cards.heading: Bargaining
cards.body: What if I just reuse last quarter's deck?

cards.label: Stage III
cards.heading: Panic
cards.body: Why is the CG asking for more color?

cards.label: Stage IV
cards.heading: Despair
cards.body: Why does the font change when I email it?

chart.title: Stress Level vs Time to Brief

takeaways: 0% of time spent fixing the problem
